name: Stuffed Peppers
recipeIngredient: 3 cups cooked rice, regular long grain
recipeInstructions:
1. Preheat oven to 350°F.
2. Spray a baking pan with nonstick cooking spray.
3. Cut the tops off the green and red bell peppers and remove the seeds and membranes. Set aside.
4. In a large bowl, combine rice, ground turkey, parsley, onion, eggs, Worcestershire sauce, paprika, cayenne pepper, and salt. Mix well.
5. Stuff an equal amount of rice mixture into each prepared bell pepper.
6. Arrange the peppers in the prepared baking pan.
7. Bake for 1-1/2 hours, basting frequently.
